title: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc (WOOF) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc (WOOF) Q3 2024 Earnings Highlights. Financial Performance: Petco reported Q3 2024 revenue of $1.51 billion, representing 1% year-over-year growth. The company achieved a gross margin of 38.1%, an expansion of 130 basis points from the prior year period. However, adjusted earnings per share remained negative at $0.02, though this represented improvement from negative $0.05 in the prior year. Key Metrics: Comparable sales: Up 2% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA: $81.2 million with a 5.4% margin rate. Free cash flow: Negative $10 million, but improved from prior year. Liquidity position: $644 million total, including $117 million in cash. Business Highlights: Services revenue demonstrated strength, up 9%, driven by vet hospitals, mobile clinics, and grooming. The merchandise inventory stood at $690 million at quarter's end. CEO Joel Anderson emphasized the company's strategic direction: Our focus is on taking costs out permanently, embedding structural changes in our DNA to drive accountability and transparency. Challenges: The supplies and companion animal categories declined 3% year-over-year, though sequential improvements were noted. SG&A expenses increased 2% due to planned labor cost increases.
